serena_lsp: 23 tools stable R4-39. activate_project --project warm. find_symbol broad 70s+ (prefer Grep). Receiver methods need '(*Type).method'. SHALLOW CLONE: detect linter adds via main.go registry-count delta + doc-lag. ALWAYS gh api issues since last_run BEFORE strategy (R37 phantom recurred).

open_issues.#38281/#38282: execcommand precision FP + enforce. OPEN 7d+. Complex control-flow. DO NOT REFILE; noop/report if dead.
open_issues.#38787: doc-sync. RESOLVED-IN-CODE (doc.go 'All 29' synced) but issue OPEN. DO NOT REFILE.
open_issues.#38788: hardcodedfilepath hasFormatVerb FP (misses %05d/width/flag+9 verbs). OPEN. Single-file.
open_issues.#38789: ctxbackground syntactic ident.Name=='context' FP/FN. Fix=ObjectOf->PkgName->Path(). OPEN. SAME class as sg39a2.
open_issues.#39180: timeafterleak enforce. LANDED (cgo.yml:1123) but issue OPEN. DO NOT REFILE.
open_issues.#39181: timeafterleak stored-channel FN (timer:=time.After(d);<-timer in loop). Alias-tracking. OPEN.
open_issues.#39323/#39324: timesleepnocontext precision(defer-cleanup FP)+enforce. 06-15 run NOT mine. DO NOT REFILE.
open_issues.#39493_R38: ssljson scene_id graph-integrity FN (SSLStep.SceneID:61 never validated). OPEN+UNFIXED-in-code.
open_issues.#39494_R38: ssljson unique-IDs gap (map[string]bool:96 dedups dups). OPEN+UNFIXED. Latent.
open_issues.sg39a1_R39: uncheckedtypeassertion comma-ok FP: safe-form only checks AssignStmt parent (:76-82); misses ValueSpec `var v,ok=x.(T)` + ParenExpr. CI-enforced. POSTED.
open_issues.sg39a2_R39: regexpcompileinfunction syntactic ident.Name=='regexp' (:81) no TypesInfo -> FN alias-import, FP shadow. Fix per sortslice #38029. CI-enforced. POSTED.

do_not_refile: ossetenv, contextcancelnotdeferred, fileclosenotdeferred, seenmapbool(#36406), sortslice(#38029 landed), execcommand(#38281/2 open7d+), hardcodedfilepath(#38788), ctxbackground(#38789), doc-sync(#38787 resolved-in-code), httpnoctx(#39016/17 landed), timeafterleak(#39180 landed,#39181 FN open), timesleepnocontext(#39323/4 open NOT mine), ssljson(#39493/4 open R38), uncheckedtypeassertion(#sg39a1), regexpcompileinfunction(#sg39a2).

patterns.phantom_issue_reconcile: ALWAYS gh api issues?labels=sergo&state=all&sort=created&per_page=20 BEFORE strategy; reconstruct missed runs. R37 created #39323/4 w/o committing memory.
patterns.syntactic_stdlib_match: STRONGEST recurring land-arg. ident.Name=='<pkg>' w/o TypesInfo -> FP(shadow var named pkg)+FN(alias import). Correct: pass.TypesInfo.ObjectOf(ident).(*types.PkgName).Imported().Path()=='<pkg>'. LANDED: sortslice #38029 (template sortslice.go:58-67). OPEN same-class: ctxbackground #38789, regexpcompileinfunction sg39a2(R39). astutil.go:72 has fmt-equiv helper.
patterns.parent-shape-too-narrow: R39 land-arg (uncheckedtypeassertion sg39a1). Linter gates safe/unsafe on ONE direct-parent AST type (AssignStmt) but the safe construct also appears as ValueSpec (`var v,ok=x.(T)`)/ParenExpr-wrapped. Enumerate ALL parent shapes of the safe form; unwrap ParenExpr. Same family as alias_intermediate_var_FN.
patterns.impl_narrower_than_own_spec: R38 ssljson. When linter embeds/references its OWN spec, diff impl vs that text (.github/skills/ssl/ssl.json:150 Pass-4 rules -> #39493/#39494).
patterns.ci_enforce_strengthens_FP: An FP in a CI-ENFORCED linter is a build-blocker => strongest impact arg. Verify enforcement at .github/workflows/cgo.yml:1123 LINTER_FLAGS before claiming.
patterns.alias_intermediate_var_FN: Gate on IMMEDIATE-parent AST shape misses intermediate var. lenstringzero#37741, tolowerequalfold#37492, timeafterleak#39181. Fix=follow var by object identity.
patterns.enforce_readiness_run_on_prod: grep prod for pattern->TP sites=enforce issue (httpnoctx#39016, timeafterleak#39180, timesleepnocontext#39324 landed/posted). Append flag cgo.yml:1123 if zero-vio; convert first if non-zero.
patterns.map_dedup_hides_duplicates: map[string]bool lookup sets silently collapse dup keys->uniqueness unenforceable (ssljson#39494). Fix: if m[k]{report}; m[k]=true.
patterns.team_closes_fast: SIMPLE single-file PRs land 1-2d (httpnoctx <1d). COMPLEX control-flow linger (execcommand 7d+). Issues NOT always auto-closed on land (#39180 landed-but-open).

ci_enforce_14: cgo.yml:1123 LINTER_FLAGS (14): errstringmatch panicinlibrarycode manualmutexunlock osexitinlibrary rawloginlib regexpcompileinfunction fprintlnsprintf strconvparseignorederror jsonmarshalignoredeerror uncheckedtypeassertion fmterrorfnoverbs tolowerequalfold httpnoctx timeafterleak. NOT enforced: ssljson, timesleepnocontext, execcommand, ctxbackground, hardcodedfilepath, lenstringzero, sortslice, seenmapbool, errorfwrapv, excessivefuncparams, largefunc, contextcancelnotdeferred, fileclosenotdeferred, ossetenvlibrary, errormessage, osexitinlibrary(IS in), jsonmarshalignoredeerror(IS in).

linters_R39.audited_so_far: ssljson(#39493/4) timeafterleak(#39180/1) httpnoctx timesleepnocontext hardcodedfilepath ctxbackground execcommand sortslice lenstringzero tolowerequalfold seenmapbool uncheckedtypeassertion(R39 sg39a1) regexpcompileinfunction(R39 sg39a2).
linters_R39.next_candidates_R40: (1) reverify sg39a1/a2 landing (small single-file, expect 1-2d); (2) FRESH never-audited linters: manualmutexunlock(207), errorfwrapv(207), excessivefuncparams(72 threshold), panicinlibrarycode, rawloginlib, strconvparseignorederror(88), fprintlnsprintf, fmterrorfnoverbs, errstringmatch, jsonmarshalignoredeerror, osexitinlibrary, ossetenvlibrary, manualmutexunlock; (3) apply syntactic_stdlib_match probe to each (any ident.Name==literal-pkg w/o TypesInfo); (4) reverify #38281/2(dead?),#38788/9,#39181,#39323/4,#39493/4 landing; (5) watch 30th linter main.go delta. Prefer single-file precision over complex control-flow.

repo_context: pkg/: ~920 prod .go (R39 count). 29 analyzer subpkgs (ssljson=skill-artifact validator) + internal/astutil+filecheck+nolint. Largest compiler_types.go 59KB, forecast.go 52KB. Issue creation MUST use Write tool for JSON (bash heredoc with {+quotes is sandbox-blocked).
